32" oak tree. Large lightning strike from the fall. Dead limbs where the current extended through the limbs.   Reason for Removal:Dying treeComments:The tree was struck by lightning in the fall. Large strike down the tree. Dead limbs where the current went through them.  We have watched since the fall.  Barely any leaves growing this spring. Appears to be dying. Hazardous to to our house and neighbors if it was to fall.
